description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beverage can with a deep red metallic body and a glossy finish. The front features a stylized logo reading 'Nuka Cola' in white script, accompanied by a pin-up style illustration of a woman in a retro-futuristic outfit. The can has a standard pull-tab opening on the top, which is silver in color and slightly raised. The surface is smooth and reflective, with subtle highlights indicating its metallic nature. No visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear are present, and the can appears unopened and intact.
description: A glossy, deep red metallic beverage can with a 'Nuka Cola' logo and pin-up illustration, featuring a standard silver pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Nuka Cola' logo and pin-up illustration clearly, with the pull-tab top visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the can's red metallic surface and a partial glimpse of the logo; the pull-tab is still visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the plain red metallic surface, with no visible branding or illustrations.
description_view_3: Angled side view with a faint part of the logo visible, mostly showing the red metallic body and the pull-tab top.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front displays a white 'Nuka Cola' script logo with a pin-up style illustration of a woman in a retro-futuristic outfit, both centrally placed on the red body.
